hooks.command: echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"UserPromptSubmit","additionalContext":"STYLE (enforce): super-compact -- bullets / tables / arrows, backtick every identifier, no paragraph > 2 lines, no narration / recap. A reply with >=2 sections -> a ### header per section AND a --- rule BETWEEN every section (dense, but separated -- never run sections together into a wall of text). 1 topic -> tight bullets, no header/rule. Expand only when asked."}}'
